scripts.build:assets: npm run build:icons && npm run build:heroes
scripts.build:acquisitions: node scripts/build-acquisitions.mjs --allow-missing-identities && node scripts/fetch-acq-logos.mjs && node scripts/build-acquisitions.mjs
scripts.deploy:recover:all: node scripts/pages-recovery.mjs --repo production && node scripts/pages-recovery.mjs --repo preview
scripts.test: npm run test:pillar-layout && npm run test:acquisitions-data && npm run test:acquisitions-timeline && npm run test:composition && npm run test:composition-spatial && npm run test:panel-hero && npm run test:spatial-labels && npm run test:spatial-filtered-photos && npm run test:planner-ui && npm run test:matrix-embed && npm run test:dcloud-learning && npm run test:shortcuts && npm run test:intent && npm run test:device-registry && npm run test:room-overlap && npm run test:walk-spacing && npm run test:walk-environments && npm run test:walk-modes && npm run test:all-products && npm run test:design-studio && npm run test:kiosk && npm run test:cloud-control && npm run test:problems && npm run test:links
